km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស, uណៃteត គីnហ្គដុម

zh.lifeSummary: Richard De Singelton於1161年出生。他於1184年之前與Matilda Fitzrobert在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1212年享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard De Singelton于1161年出生。他于1184年之前与Matilda Fitzrobert在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1212年享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Singelton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Singleton
meanings: habitational name from Singleton (Lancashire), probably from Old English scingol ‘shingle, wooden roof tile’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Bearers of this surname are said to be descended from Ughtred de Sinleton, holder of lands in Amounderness wapentake (Lancashire) c. 1160–90. This name was first recorded in Ireland in 1308 and firmly established in Louth and Monaghan during the 17th century.
habitational name from Singleton (Sussex), probably from Old English sængel, sengel ‘bundle, tuft’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard De Singelton was born in 1161. He married Matilda Fitzrobert before 1184, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1212, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard De Singelton est né en 1161. Il a épousé Matilda Fitzrobert avant 1184, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1212, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard De Singelton wurde 1161 geboren. Er hat vor 1184 in England Matilda Fitzrobert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1212 im Alter von 51 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Richard De Singelton è nato il nel 1161. Lui sposato Matilda Fitzrobert prima del 1184, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1212, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard De Singeltonは1161年に生まれた。1184年以前にイギリスでMatilda Fitzrobertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1212年に51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard De Singelton(은)는 1161년 태어났다. 그는 1184년 이전 영국에서 Matilda Fitzrobert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1212년 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard De Singelton nasceu em 1161. Ele casou-se com Matilda Fitzrobert antes 1184, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1212, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard De Singelton родился в 1161 г. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Fitzrobert перед 1184 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1212 г. в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Richard De Singelton nació en 1161. Se casó con Matilda Fitzrobert antes de 1184, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1212, a la edad de 51 años.
